chunks.title: The Syro-Ephraimite Crisis and Isaiah's Message
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the political threat followed by Yahweh's initial oracle to Ahaz through Isaiah.

chunks.title: The Sign of Immanuel and the Promise of Deliverance
chunks.reason: A dialogue between Yahweh, Isaiah, and Ahaz regarding the sign, culminating in a prophecy of future judgment.

chunks.title: The Coming Invasion and Desolation
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle describing the Assyrian invasion using metaphors of flies, bees, and a razor, followed by descriptions of land desolation.
